creator: aldis@bsdroot.lv
text:
On Wed, 29 Jun 2011 11:23:11 +0400
Max Brazhnikov <makc@freebsd.org> wrote:

> I see 1.6.10 was released after 2.0 and lyx developers recommend to
> keep 1.6 for a while. Since 1.6.10 is a final in 1.6 series I propose
> to copy print/lyx to print/lyx16 and update print/lyx to 2.0.

Sounds good.

In this case patch should be adjusted (removing PKGNAMESUFFIX line
probably will be enough)
